label: round-6 community core
merge_method: FedAvg uniform across dense + NetBank V
notes: First merged core that beats every individual worker on BOTH headline metrics.
format_validity jumped 5.5× from xWXmA's 0.020 to the merged 0.110 — first non-trivial cross-tier signal.

Distillation harvest (Gaussian + real-query) matched FedAvg but didn't exceed it — workers ran identical corpus so ensemble averages = no unique content to combine. Round-7 sharded-corpus experiment will test whether merge benefit grows when workers truly diverge.
